name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working as expected

labels: bug

## Describe the bug
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## To reproduce
1. Event that triggered the issue (e.g. `sessionStart`, `errorOccurred`)
2. OS and shell (e.g. Windows + PowerShell 7, macOS + Bash)
3. Steps to reproduce

## Expected behaviour
<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

## Actual behaviour
<!-- What actually happened. Include any output or error messages. -->

## Environment

| | Value |
|--|--|
| OS | <!-- e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 --> |
| Shell | <!-- bash / pwsh / powershell.exe --> |
| sqlite3 version | <!-- `sqlite3 --version` --> |
| Copilot CLI version | <!-- `copilot --version` --> |
| kaizen version | <!-- from `copilot plugin list` --> |

## Additional context
<!-- Any other relevant information. -->
